75699.subject: China's Semiconductor Race: A Missing Allocation
75699.body:
VanEck Investment Insights

Автор: VanEck


Автор: VanEck

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/chinas-semiconductor-race-missing-allocation-vaneck-upbje?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B2etFkbnSS6uQHX4kT%2B5gdg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2uGmNtMBMmCck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrdk30zo~h2-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrdk30zo-h2
  
Export controls intended to slow China’s chip industry have instead accelerated it. Each restriction on a foreign supplier has created a direct procurement opening for a domestic alternative, and state funding, localization mandates, and captive demand from government and enterprise buyers have reinforced that dynamic at every layer of the supply chain. Yet most U.S. investors with semiconductor or China exposure own none of these companies. Semiconductor ETFs are built around U.S. and global names. China equity funds are dominated by consumer internet and financials. Neither captures the domestic chip industry in any meaningful way. Topics: Why U.S. export controls accelerated China’s semiconductor build-out rather than slowing it How policy is routing demand to domestic suppliers across design, fabrication, and equipment Why the companies at the center of this build-out are largely absent from conventional semiconductor and China allocations Register here: https://www.vaneck.com/us/en/webinar-registration/?id=99483895944&utm_source=vaneck&utm_medium=calendar
Приєднатися до обговорення
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/chinas-semiconductor-race-missing-allocation-vaneck-upbje?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B2etFkbnSS6uQHX4kT%2B5gdg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2uGmNtMBMmCck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_-null-fz96fz~mrdk30zo~h2-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrdk30zo-h2
  
      

----------------------------------------

Це повідомлення е-поштою адресовано учасникові Oleh Novosadov (I am 36 years old, and I am passionate about the world of cryptocurrencies and blockchain technologies. My professional interests include investing in cryptocurrencies, exploring blockchain, Web3, and the DeFi sector.)
Дізнатися, чому ми включили цю інформацію https://www.linkedin.com/help/linkedin/answer/4788?lang=uk&lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B2etFkbnSS6uQHX4kT%2B5gdg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2uGmNtMBMmCck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-SecurityHelp-0-textfooterglimmer&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-SecurityHelp-0-textfooterglimmer-null-fz96fz~mrdk30zo~h2-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrdk30zo-

75697.subject: UBIAN - Potvrdenie o zaplatení
75697.body:
Objednávka č. 13476953 vo výške 1.49 EUR zo dňa 7/9/2026 3:32 PM bola úspešne zrealizovaná.

Informácie o objednávke:

Parkovací lístok Košice, Tarifné pásmo A1
EČV vozidla: LE066BI
Začiatok parkovania: 7/9/2026 3:32 PM
Koniec parkovania: 7/9/2026 4:02 PM
Cena: 1.49 EUR

Prevádzkovateľ: Mesto Košice

Potvrdenie o zaplatení objednávky Vám príde až po skončení platnosti lístka. Potvrdenie bude možné stiahnuť aj po prihlásení na stránke https://www.ubian.sk v záložke Objednávky.

Lístok je elektronický, nemusíte ho zakladať za predné sklo vozidla. Pri kontrole systém automaticky overí, či pre dané EČV bol vydaný parkovací lístok.
Viac informácií nájdete na stránke https://parking.kosice.sk/.

S pozdravom
Tím Ubian

TransData s.r.o.
M.R.Štefánika 139
010 01 Žilina

telefón: +421 41 399 88 99
e-mail: info@ubian.sk
web: http://www.ubian.sk

75696.subject: SCONTO - výzva k odberu
75696.body: .apply-styles body{margin:0;padding:0}.apply-styles img{border:0!important;outline:none!important}.apply-styles p{Margin:0px!important;Padding:0px!important}.apply-styles table{border-collapse:collapse;mso-table-lspace:0px;mso-table-rspace:0px}.apply-styles td, .apply-styles a, .apply-styles span{border-collapse:collapse;mso-line-height-rule:exactly}.apply-styles a[x-apple-data-detectors], .apply-styles u+.-wm-em_body a{color:inherit!important;text-decoration:none;font-size:inherit!important;font-family:inherit!important;font-weight:inherit!important;line-height:inherit}@media screen and (max-width: 600px) {.apply-styles .-wm-mobile_hide{display:none!important}.apply-styles .-wm-mobile_show{display:block!important}.apply-styles .-wm-mobile_block{display:block!important;width:100%!important}.apply-styles .-wm-mobile_max_width{width:100%!important}.apply-styles .-wm-pl10{padding-left:10px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-pr10{padding-right:10px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-pb10{padding-bottom:10px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-tac{text-align:center!important}.apply-styles .-wm-w107{width:107px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-w150{width:150px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-w270{width:270px!important}} Vážený zákazník, Vaša kúpna zmluva č. 3671916 je pripravená k odberu. Kúpnu zmluvu môžete uhradiť v hotovosti či kartou na pokladni obchodného domu alebo priamo vo výdajnom sklade na samoobslužnej pokladni platobnou kartou. Nezabudnite si so sebou vziať kúpnu zmluvu - budete ju potrebovať pri platbe a pri preberaní tovaru zo skladu. Štandardná doba výdaja sa zvyčajne pohybuje okolo 10 minút. V prípade rozsiahlejších objednávok alebo počas denných špičiek sa však táto doba môže výrazne predĺžiť. Ak chcete dobu výdaja skrátiť, zarezervujte si, prosím, niektorý z voľných termínov tu . Tovar pre vás pripravíme vopred. V prípade akýchkoľvek otázok nás neváhajte kontaktovať. Telefón: +421 222 11 55 65 E-mail: zakaznicky@servis.sconto.sk Otváracie hodiny Vami vybraného obchodného domu nájdete tu . Ďakujeme za Váš nákup a želáme Vám príjemný deň. Vaše SCONTO Potrebujete poradiť? Sme tu pre Vás celý týždeň vrátane víkendov 8-18h +421 222 11 55 65 zakaznicky@servis.sconto.sk Vše o nákupu Obchodní podmínky Starostlivosť o nábytok Odstúpenie od zmluvy Reklamácie Sledujte nás Prevádzkovateľom internetového obchodu sconto.sk je SCONTO Nábytok s.r.o., Nová ul. 8144/10, 917 01 Trnava, IČO 44731159, DIČ 2022821273, IČ DPH SK 2022821273, zapísaná v obchodnom registri Okresného súdu Trnava, oddiel Sro, vložka 25761/T.

75682.subject: Claude Managed Agents Quietly Became the Most Important AI Infrastructure Bet of 2026 🤖
75682.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/claude-managed-agents-update

👋 Hey, Linas here! Every day, I break down 3 stories shaping the future of FinTech & Artificial Intelligence - plus the money movements and trends worth tracking. First time here? 395k+ FinTech and AI leaders get this daily. Join them:
In April, I published The Ultimate Guide to Claude Managed Agents 🤖 [ https://substack.com/redirect/e4bda355-f08e-44a9-b769-21438cb2464c?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], the most thorough breakdown of Anthropic’s new managed agent runtime available anywhere. 
Thousands of you read it. That was Day Zero.
As I’m writing this on July 9, 2026, most of what people “know” about Claude Managed Agents is now out of date, including parts of my own guide.
In the three months since launch, this product has changed more than most software changes in a year.
→ The research-preview shelf has nearly emptied: Memory, Multi-agent coordination, and Outcomes all quietly shipped to public beta.
→ Anthropic added scheduled deployments, which turn a Claude agent from a tool you call into an autonomous worker that runs itself on a cron schedule, pulls its own credentials, and reports back while you sleep.
→ AWS and Google looked at the architecture and shipped near-identical managed harnesses two weeks after launch, both on the same day.
→ And the first real production economics finally surfaced, including one company that 3x’d to $10M in annualized revenue on Anthropic's agent stack.
That’s why I went back and fact-checked every headline number from the launch coverage against primary sources: the pricing pages, the engineering posts, the customer stories, the support docs. Some of the most-quoted metrics about Claude Managed Agents do not hold up the way people repeat them. One famous customer stat is actually two different stories stitched together. Another widely cited figure isn’t a per-task cost at all.
If you’re about to bet a roadmap, a build decision, or an investment thesis on this, you are almost certainly working from at least one number that’s wrong.
This is the follow-up to the original guide [ https://substack.com/redirect/e4bda355-f08e-44a9-b769-21438cb2464c?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]. It tells you what actually shipped, which numbers are real, what the competition did, and exactly what it means if you’re a founder, a builder, or an investor deciding whether to commit to this stack right now.
Everything below is the part most people will get wrong.
The Research-Preview Shelf Emptied Out, Fast...

Unsubscribe https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5hcy5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWN0aW9uL2Rpc2FibGVfZW1haWw_dG9rZW49ZXlKMWMyVnlYMmxrSWpveE1Ea3dOVFV6TURnc0luQnZjM1JmYVdRaU9qSXdNalF6TnpBM09Dd2lhV0YwSWpveE56Z3pOVGc1TkRVekxDSmxlSEFpT2pFNE1UVXhNalUwTlRNc0ltbHpjeUk2SW5CMVlpMDRNVGd4T1NJc0luTjFZaUk2SW1ScGMyRmliR1ZmWlcxaGFXd2lmUS4xSmFEOC1HWGdiTmV5QWVnQ
